## Goal

What should Research Wiki help you do?

## Layer

Choose one:

- Core contract
- Command/UI implementation
- Personal workflow
- Documentation
- GitHub/support

## Proposed behavior

Describe the behavior you want.

## Why this belongs in Research Wiki

Explain why this should be part of the template instead of personal notes.
